span.p:
Form 4 atom feed
officer / director trades

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Filter: code = P (open-market buy)
amount ≥ $200k
role ≠ pure 10% holder

Path A: Registry-based
NVIDIA / SK Telecom / MGX /
Microsoft / Samsung / TSMC / ...

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Path B: Theme classifier (v2.4)
AI / DataCenter / Hyperscaler
proxy keywords (catches POWL)

span.p:
composite.py
same ticker fires
BOTH firehoses
within 30 days?
